items.title: Marathon's Steam player count keeps sliding, down over 75% from its peak
items.summary: Third party tracking data shows Marathon's Steam concurrent player count sitting far below its launch day peak of 88,337, with estimates ranging from roughly 2,600 to 23,000 players online depending on the tracker used. The decline has continued despite Season 2's launch and a recent 10 day free trial period meant to bring players back.
items.credibility_note: Based on third party player count tracking rather than an official Bungie or Sony statement, so treated as community data rather than confirmed fact.

items.title: Context: Bungie layoffs cut Marathon leadership including its General Manager
items.summary: This story was first reported between June 25 and June 28, 2026. Bungie confirmed a major layoff round tied to the shutdown of Destiny 2 that also hit senior Marathon roles, including General Manager Scott Taylor and multiple Engineering Directors, with separations taking effect July 9. Sony's Hermen Hulst said the cuts affected most of the former Destiny team and some Marathon staff, while insisting Marathon remains the studio's central focus going forward.
items.credibility_note: Corroborated by multiple established outlets citing Sony and Bungie statements plus WARN filing records.

items.title: Context: Bungie sets July 21 date for new Vault Breaker PvE mode
items.summary: This announcement originally went out around June 20 to 21, 2026. Bungie confirmed Marathon's mid-season update arrives July 21 and adds Vault Breaker, an experimental PvE mode set in the Cryo Archive map that can be played solo, in duos, or as a full crew. Players keep a new currency called Vault Data to upgrade Sponsored Kits but leave other looted gear behind, and a full Season 3 update with a revamped Perimeter map is planned for September 22.
items.credibility_note: Direct official announcement from Bungie's own news page, corroborated by independent outlet coverage.

items.title: Marathon runs a 30% Steam discount through July 9
items.summary: Marathon's official Steam store page is currently offering a 30% discount, bringing the standard edition down to $27.99 and the deluxe edition to $41.99. The sale is set to run through July 9 and comes as the game continues struggling to hold onto players since its March launch.
items.credibility_note: Directly from the official Steam store listing for Marathon.

items.title: Retrospective highlights Marathon's original soundtrack by Ryan Lott
items.summary: A music focused gaming site recapped Marathon's two volume original soundtrack, composed by Ryan Lott of Son Lux, including a collaboration track featuring Poppy and over 90 minutes of in-game score. The piece references Bungie's earlier behind the scenes video where audio director Chase Combs and Lott discussed how the score was built.
items.credibility_note: A niche but dedicated video game music outlet reporting factual soundtrack details rather than rumor, though it is not one of the major gaming news outlets.
